message:
feat(harness): process-isolated conformance execution, structured proof logging, and determinism/linkage proofs

- harness binary: add --isolate mode with per-case child process execution
  and configurable --case-timeout-ms, --perf-budget-ms flags; add hidden
  conformance-matrix-case subcommand for subprocess entrypoint; structured
  JSONL conformance logging with bead-id tagging
- conformance_matrix: expand CaseExecution with isolation metadata and
  performance budget tracking
- evidence_compliance: proof-logging infrastructure with artifact resolution
  source tracking, structured LogEmitter integration, per-proof JSONL output
- runtime_math_determinism_proofs: new module for deterministic runtime-math
  kernel export verification
- runtime_math_linkage_proofs: expand linkage proof surface for new kernel
  framework trait methods
- Tests: add evidence_compliance_test, runtime_math_determinism_proofs_test,
  support_matrix_maintenance_test; expand stub_regression_guard_test,
  conformance_matrix_test, symbol_latency_baseline_test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
